rationale: The proposed change to the residence homestead exemption under §11.13(b) has no relation to §11.33, which governs exemptions for raw cocoa and green coffee held in Harris County. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: A person is entitled to an exemption from taxation of raw cocoa and green coffee that the person holds in Harris County.
_note: Rule text concerns an entirely unrelated exemption (raw cocoa and green coffee) and does not reference residence homestead exemptions or §11.13.
